g.text: Final-year BTech CSE student specializing in cybersecurity at
Centurion University. Co-founder of SoleSet, builder of IqamaPrint,
and creator of PHANTOM — an autonomous AI pentesting agent. Active
in bug bounty, responsible disclosure, and red teaming.
Autonomous AI pentesting agent · 33-class attack framework · Electron + Playwright · CDP tool registry
Live cloud-native doc platform · thousands of registered users · Supabase, Razorpay, RLS security
Chrome MV3 extension · static analysis + Anthropic API · IDOR / auth bypass / vibe-code detection
Hardware-level keystroke injection at 500–800 CPM · keyboard lib · zero fat-finger errors · GUI
Co-founded e-commerce · Next.js / Supabase · budget-friendly shoes · live at soleset.in
Desktop tool · digital signature verification · PyMuPDF + pyhanko · dark UI, threaded, color-coded
